title: desmodium biarticulatum
intro: Desmodium biarticulatum, also known as two-leaf desmodium or two-jointed tick clover, is a perennial legume native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Desmodium biarticulatum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. Desmodium biarticulatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are also used in traditional herbal remedies.
